title: Support  - App page Cancel
scenario: Tapping Cancel (X) on the App page in the Support section returns user to the Support main screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the menu icon or navigate to the Support section.
On the Support main screen, tap any option to open an App page (e.g., "About", "Help", etc.).
On the App page, tap the Cancel (X) button located in the top corner of the screen.
expected: The App page is dismissed and the user is returned to the Support main screen.
